# Innovius Capital — Daily Portfolio Intelligence Brief
Run ID: TEST-0323 | Generated: 2026-03-23 | Sources: slack_channels, slack_dms, gmail, granola

---

## Source Integrity
All four sources confirmed available. No FAILED sources.
- slack_channels: OK (14 tool calls)
- slack_dms: OK (8 tool calls)
- gmail: OK (7 tool calls)
- granola: OK (3 tool calls)

---

## Hot Signals

- [Sewer AI · Q1 board update draft contains framing weaker than what Akash cautioned — board distribution imminent; THREE-SOURCE convergence (slack_channels #p-sewerai + gmail + granola stand-up); Dave Barden already pushed back on PAYG narrative in stand-up · SOURCE: slack_channels #p-sewerai 2026-03-23 + gmail 2026-03-23 + granola 2026-03-23]
- [Delightree · Akash made a live, named commitment in ICP Workshop Session 2 to deliver Clay/ZoomInfo/LeadIQ recommendation by EOD today — Tushar and Doug both acknowledged the deadline; Doug DM reconfirmed this morning · SOURCE: granola 2026-03-23 + slack_dms DM with Doug 2026-03-23]
- [RightRev · Pavel Reznikov RevOps candidate has strong hire recommendation from Matthew — budget approval from Akash is the single blocker before an offer can be extended · SOURCE: gmail 2026-03-23]

---

## Hot Actions

- [Sewer AI · Review and correct Billy's Q1 board update draft before it is distributed to the board — Q1 miss framing is softer than Akash's prior guidance and Dave Barden has already flagged it as insufficient in stand-up; board distribution is imminent · Billy (Sewer AI) and board recipients waiting · SOURCE: new · gmail + granola + #p-sewerai · 2026-03-23]
- [Delightree · Deliver Clay vs ZoomInfo vs LeadIQ ICP tech stack recommendation to Doug and Tushar by EOD today (2026-03-23) — Akash committed to this deadline in a recorded meeting; Doug confirmed via DM it is still blocked on Akash · Doug (Delightree) and Tushar (Delightree) waiting · SOURCE: new · granola ICP Workshop Session 2 + DM with Doug · 2026-03-23]
- [RightRev · Confirm budget approval for Pavel Reznikov RevOps offer — Matthew has submitted strong recommend, offer cannot proceed without Akash sign-off; candidate windows are perishable · Matthew (RightRev) waiting · SOURCE: new · gmail · 2026-03-23]
- [RightRev · Reply to Dan's DM confirming Wednesday MoF discussion — Jagan wants to join; Dan sent at 07:30 ET today with no response yet · Dan (RightRev) and Jagan (RightRev) waiting · SOURCE: new · DM with Dan · 2026-03-23]

Know:

- Billy sent the Q1 board update draft to Akash for review via email today; the framing is softer than Akash's prior guidance. (gmail · 2026-03-23)
- Cole confirmed PG&E PO signing expected this week — positive near-term revenue catalyst. (granola · 2026-03-23)

Action:

Action:
- Update any Innovius external-facing materials (website, decks, deal memos) that reference Justin Moore's prior role — Justin flagged this to the full Innovius team today. Not time-critical within 24h but should be completed this week.

## Cross-portfolio patterns

- Executive search activity is elevated across three companies simultaneously: Auditoria (CMO, Cole Group, 2 candidates this week), X-Cures (CRO, Cole Group, shortlist sent), RightRev (RevOps, internal hiring, offer pending). Akash should assess whether Cole Group bandwidth is being spread thin across Innovius portfolio engagements.
- Two founder-facing deliverables are due from Akash today (Delightree ICP tech stack, Sewer AI board update review) — both have named founders/executives acknowledged as waiting. Back-to-back same-day commitments create scheduling risk.
- Justin Moore's transition to CloudZero CEO creates a coverage gap for Akash at Innovius on any firm-level tasks Justin previously owned; the DM from Justin on sourcing velocity recalibration (slack_dms · 2026-03-23) may be the first signal of this gap — Akash should clarify scope of response needed.
